## Overview

Sage Group plc (LSE: SGE) is a UK-headquartered (Newcastle) FTSE 100 company specialising in accounting, HR, and payroll software for SMEs. Sage HR and Sage Payroll are the relevant products for ArcKit Consulting; the broader Sage Accounting and Sage 50 lines are alternatives to Xero / FreeAgent / QuickBooks. For ArcKit Consulting v1, Sage HR + Sage Payroll is the recommended HR / payroll stack on the basis of UK origin, deep payroll integration, and SME-friendly per-employee pricing.

## Products & Services

- **Sage HR** — from £4.60/employee/month. Core HR (employee records, leave, performance) plus optional modules (recruitment, performance, expenses, learning, shift scheduling).
- **Sage Payroll** — UK payroll, RTI / HMRC integration, auto-enrolment pensions; pricing tiered by employee count (typical bundle £15–£60/month for 5–25 employees).
- **Sage Accounting** — £15–£39/month tiered.
- **Sage 50** — desktop / hybrid product, more complex businesses.
- **Sage People** — enterprise HR (Salesforce platform); enterprise pricing.

## Pricing Model

- **Per-employee subscription** for Sage HR.
- **Tiered subscription** by employee band for Sage Payroll.
- Annual or monthly billing.
- Bundle discounts when combining Sage HR + Sage Payroll + Sage Accounting.

## UK Government Presence

- G-Cloud listed: Yes (Sage is a G-Cloud supplier for various enterprise products).
- DOS listed: No.
- UK data centres: Yes — Sage is UK-headquartered with UK / EU data residency for UK products. UK GDPR-aligned by design.

## Strengths

- **UK-built, UK-hosted, UK-tax-compliant** — Sage Payroll handles RTI, auto-enrolment pensions, P11D, P60, P45 natively. Updated for UK Budget changes promptly.
- **Deep payroll-HR integration** — Sage HR and Sage Payroll designed to work together; payroll fed from HR records without manual transfer.
- **Mature** — Sage Group founded 1981; payroll products are decades old and battle-tested.
- **SME-friendly pricing** — £4.60/employee/month for Sage HR is in the SME-affordable band.
- **Recognised by UK accountants** — most UK accountancies use Sage; integration with practice's external accountancy services is straightforward.
- **MTD-compliant** for VAT and payroll RTI.

## Weaknesses

- **UI feels older than Personio / BambooHR** — design language is functional rather than modern.
- **Integration ecosystem smaller than Xero / QuickBooks** — Sage's integration partners are fewer outside accountancy.
- **Bundle pricing complexity** — different SKUs for different bundle combinations can be confusing.
- **Sage 50** legacy product creates branding confusion; new customers should select Sage HR + Sage Payroll (cloud) not Sage 50 (desktop).
